summary: Iteration 15: Tested Bilingual PDF generation, Google Calendar Status API, Documents Page, and RTL Layout. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bilingual PDF generator (bilingual_pdf_generator.py) properly creates PDFs with both Arabic and English text using Arabic font registration and RTL text processing
Google Calendar status API correctly returns 'not configured' when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is missing - this is expected behavior
Documents page properly integrates DocumentManagement component and is accessible via /documents route
Contracts tab correctly shows two PDF download buttons per contract: standard (English) and bilingual (AR/EN)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Bilingual PDF, Google Calendar Status, Documents Page) are working correctly. RTL layout is properly implemented across all tabs. Google Calendar integration will show 'Connect Calendar' button once GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are configured in environment.

findings: Bilingual PDF generates valid PDF with both Arabic and English content
Public endpoint accessible without authentication
Admin endpoint requires authentication
Standard PDF endpoint still works alongside bilingual
Returns proper structure: enabled, configured, connected, message
Returns configured=false when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID not set (expected)
Calendar connect/disconnect buttons correctly hidden when not configured
Audit scheduling page works without calendar integration
Documents page accessible via sidebar 'المستندات' link
Lists uploaded documents with download and delete options
Back to dashboard button works
RTL layout correct
Standard PDF download button visible (icon only)
Bilingual PDF download button visible with 'AR/EN' label
Both buttons have proper data-testid attributes
5 contracts displayed with both buttons per row
Sidebar positioned on RIGHT (x=1664 with width 256)
Actions column on LEFT side of tables
Arabic text properly displayed throughout
Arabic day names in audit calendar
